message:
Add property-based tests with proptest for invariant verification

- Add proptest 1.6 to dev-dependencies
- Create tests/property_tests.rs with 44 property tests:
  - Color: RGB roundtrips, hex parsing, downgrade monotonicity, ANSI codes
  - Style: null identity, combine behavior, render balance, ANSI format
  - Measurement: min<=max invariant, clamp bounds, union/add commutativity
  - Segment: split preserves content, cell length consistency
  - Text: divide/concat, slice bounds, append, split_lines
- All tests configured for 1000+ cases per property
- Closes rich_rust-zt5, unblocks rich_rust-33q (Test Coverage EPIC)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
